## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs update

## Validation

- [ ] Local run completed
- [ ] `python -m py_compile ...` passed
- [ ] `python main.py --doctor` passed (or explained why not)

## Notes

Any migration, compatibility, or operational impact.
